headline: Sexual harassment tribunal receives 340 complaints in first year
context: The Anti-Sexual Harassment Tribunal established under the 2022 Act received 340 complaints in its first full year of operation in 2024.

cards.big: 340 sexual harassment complaints filed with new tribunal in 2024
cards.sub: First year of operation reveals significant demand for formal mechanisms

cards.big: Anti-Sexual Harassment Act 2022 covers all persons regardless of employment
cards.sub: Tribunal can impose fines up to RM250,000 but not imprisonment

cards.big: WAO reported 60% of Malaysian women experienced harassment by 2024 survey
cards.sub: Only 6% of those who experienced harassment filed any formal complaint

cards.big: 78% of tribunal complaints came from women in private sector employment
cards.sub: Public sector and informal economy workers remain largely unreached

cards.big: 340 complaints from a population where 60% experience harassment shows the gap
Tribunal completed adjudication of only 89 cases in its first year
